candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label and preferred candidate.
Not revenue; this is a cost line and only relevant as a fallback candidate list artifact.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit top-line revenue row.

candidates.why: Direct cost of sales / cost of revenues line.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total cost of revenues row as COGS.

candidates.why: Looks like direct property/service operating costs and aligns with cost of revenues, so better treated as COGS-related than SG&A.
Classic overhead/administrative expense and appropriate SG&A component.

variables.notes: Used Administrative Expenses as the SG&A overhead component. Excluded Property Operating Expenses because it appears to be a direct operating cost tied to revenue generation and overlaps conceptually with Cost of Revenues - Total.
No dedicated research and development expense line appears on the Income Statement.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Only a specific subcomponent of interest expense, not preferred as the main line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

candidates.why: Broader finance cost line; suitable fallback if the dedicated interest line is unavailable in some years.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Priority list uses the dedicated interest expense line first, with broader Financial Expense - Total as fallback for any label changes across years.

candidates.why: Best equity line because it represents shareholders' equity and avoids potential double counting with minority interest.
Acceptable fallback, but less preferred than shareholders' equity if minority interest could exist.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity

candidates.why: Whole balance sheet total, not equity.

variables.notes: Preferred Shareholders' Equity - Total. Included Total Equity as lower-priority fallback in case the reporting label changes across years. No separate non-controlling interest line is present.
No minority interest / non-controlling interests line appears on the Balance Sheet.
